title: Malaysian Style Pork Satay
description: A classic Southeast Asian dish featuring marinated pork skewers grilled to perfection. Serve with peanut sauce and steamed rice for a delicious meal.
instructions: Cut the pork shoulder into 1-inch cubes.
In a blender or food processor, combine coconut milk, peanut butter, brown sugar, ginger, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper. Blend until smooth.
Add the pork cubes to the marinade and mix until they are well coated.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Thread 5-6 pieces of marinated pork onto each skewer.
Grill the satay for 8-10 minutes per side, or until they are cooked through.
Serve with peanut sauce and steamed rice.
